query: SELECT CATALOG_ID, SOURCE, REGION_NAME, REGION_KEY, HIERARCHY, CONTINENT, COUNTRY, PBF_URL, PBF_SIZE_MB, LEVEL, MIN_LAT, MAX_LAT, MIN_LON, MAX_LON FROM OPENROUTESERVICE_APP.CORE.REGION_CATALOG ORDER BY SOURCE, LEVEL, REGION_KEY
